programme.desc: Estelle Castlewood (Celeste Holm) begins to discover what a charming gentleman Bertram McDonald (Sir John Mills) is when she meets him as an equal aboard ship in "A Good and Faithful Servant.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a “black box.”

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A doctor seeks revenge on the man he blames for ruining his practice.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas unmasks a killer posing as a door-to-door seed salesman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Marshall Torrance run into trouble while transporting a captured killer back to face trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deathbed request from an old friend sends Lucas to a neighboring town in search of the man's long-lost sweetheart.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas thinks he has seen a ghost when a young man, eerily similar to a man he killed in the Civil War, challenges him to a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas agrees to take a job as an undercover agent and goes to investigate rumors of the sales of arms to renegade Indians. His life is endangered by the town drunk who stumbles onto his true identity.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Lucas is in Wyoming on the trail of a gang illegally selling weapons to the Indians, Mark stays with Miss Milly, where he suffers from loneliness and doubt with his father gone for 2 months.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas looks for answers when recovering alcoholic Micah Torrence returns to the bottle and turns in his badge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: In a ghost town, Lucas, Mark and Micah tangle with the Newman family and learn the secret of the town's 20-year-old mystery of a lost gold mine.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Blinded in an explosion, Lucas fights despair as he prepares for a meeting with a gun-toting enemy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deranged ex-prisoner of war, cruelly abused in a Northern army prison, captures Lucas, locks him in a cage and vows to make him suffer for his part in the Civil War.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A traveling salesman can't talk his way out of an assault charge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is threatened with hanging by a lynch party when some horses he has purchased in a neighboring town turn out to be stolen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A janitor-turned-gunfighter's reputation hangs on one lucky shot and a lot of gall. The handyman finds himself in trouble when he accidentally kills another gunfighter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to get help when he is shot after witnessing a murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After being foreman of a jury that convicted an Apache, Lucas is marked for death. Now, he must discover who is behind the curse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas allows some snowed-in stagecoach passengers to stay with him until the roads are passable. Trouble brews when the whiskey salesman and gunfighter fall for the same woman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two pranksters write away for a mail-order bride, using Lucas's name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas recognizes Dr. Battle as an ex-gunslinger with whom he once fought. He helps with a dying man, but Lucas and the doctor have unresolved anger.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A Chinese man and his son fight prejudice as they try to open a laundry in North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Lucas and Mark are traveling across the Mexican desert they encounter a trio of Mexican bandits who demand payment to cross "their" desert.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark takes a job as a stable boy against his father's wishes.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are held hostage in her general store when two gunmen attempt a daring robbery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two prison wagon drivers stop at the McCain ranch looking for whiskey. Lucas turns them down because they are escorting a murderer, to be hanged in Yuma.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark goes to work for Will Temple, a badly scarred, very mysterious rancher.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Corey Hazlett insists he's innocent of murder, despite Lucas's eyewitness testimony.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to dissuade a latter-day knight from rushing into battle.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three tough-looking men on motorcycles disrupt a peaceful suburb when they move in. Yet the neighbors could never imagine just how dangerous these men really are.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mysterious phone calls haunt a disabled woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A computer technician must deal with the queen of all femme fatales: a computer named Agnes who wreaks havoc on his love life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After being chased on horseback by a terrifying, unidentified figure in black, Anne Henderson faces the biggest decision of her life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A Confederate spy is spared death when the rope meant to hang him miraculously breaks. Or does it?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Columnist Jordan Herrick is startled to learn that a famous movie actress hasn't aged in years. Intrigued, he investigates... and soon learns a terrifying secret.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A dying man demands his family wear masks that he's given them at a Mardi Gras party.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On the day an unpopular idealist is to be executed for the killing of a racist bully, the townsfolk are shocked to see the skies have turned pitch black.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man's wish to listen to loud noise backfires.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing burglaries.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Major Ivan Kuchenko is trapped inside a hotel room with Commissar Vassiloff, a hitman, and Boris, his assistant, in the room across the street. Vassiloff has planted a bomb in the room and Ivan must find it within three hours or be blown to bits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bob and Millie wake up to find they are in a strange town. Everything appears to be props - trees, animals even cars.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jared Garrity arrives in the Old West town of Happiness, Arizona, proclaiming he can revive the dead.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A factory CEO replaces human workers with machines.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A singer's song becomes tragically real.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Two unhappy children find a happy escape in a swimming pool.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A flashback reveals the origins of Alpha and Beta; Alpha attempts to toughen up Lydia as they prepare to walk with the dead; the Whisperers create their herds.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The threat of the Whisperers return leads to paranoia sweeping over Alexandria; in the meantime, Carol battles with the need for revenge.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Still-paranoid Alexandrians get riled up over the Whisperers and take their fear out on Negan; at Hilltop, the group deals with an unexpected safety issue.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Supplies go missing from Hilltop; Negan is idolized by an Alexandrian; Ezekiel holds a secret.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol and Daryl go on a mission together while Siddiq struggles to solve a mystery.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol pushes boundaries that make Daryl uncomfortable; Alpha and Beta have reservations about someone.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A fight causes tensions in Oceanside while the Alexandrians set out on a high-stakes mission.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group must figure out how to get out of a precarious situation.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group must defend Alexandria from a threatening outside force.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Whisperers are coming for Hilltop; after Daryl and Lydia's encounter with Alpha, the communities must decide whether to run or fight; Eugene's communication with Stephanie gets complicated.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne takes Virgil back to his mysterious island to reunite with his family; in exchange, Virgil promises weapons that could change the tide of the Whisperer War.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Negan's help, Alpha and the Whisperers attack Hilltop.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Heroes and villains reckon with the aftermath of the Hilltop fire; Eugene takes a group on a journey to meet Stephanie, with the hopes of befriending another civilization.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The communities prepare for the final battle of the Whisperer War; meanwhile, Eugene's group encounters Princess.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Beta engages the final battle of the Whisperer War.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie returns, to the dismay of Negan; the trials she endured since leaving have made her harder in order for her and her son to survive; Daryl and Maggie unexpectedly fight an unseen and unknown threat.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick lleva al grupo al CDC luego del ataque mientras que Jim deberá tomar una terrible decisión de vida o muerte.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y el grupo son admitidos en el CDC por un extraño doctor. Sin embargo, no todo es lo que parece en el nuevo paraíso.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick lleva al grupo fuera de Atlanta. En la autopista, los detiene una amenaza diferente a todo lo que han visto antes. El grupo busca a alguien que ha desaparecido.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Al acudir en auxilio de otra persona, Rick descubre un posible refugio. Shane debe emprender una misión peligrosa para conseguir suministros médicos de suma necesidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo espera, desesperadamente, el regreso de Shane que se encuentra atrapado en una escuela, rodeado por los zombis. Daryl y Andrea buscan a alguien en el bosque.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Shane hace un sacrificio mortal que provoca un comportamiento extraño y autodistanciamiento. El resto del grupo intenta resistir en un punto medio entre vivir para morir y morir por vivir.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Preocupados por su seguridad, el grupo idea un plan, uno con el que Hershel no está para nada de acuerdo. Él deja bien claro que el grupo puede quedarse por ahora, pero no de forma indefinida.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn, el único que rompe barreras entre ambos grupos, sabe mucho más de lo que le gustaría. Daryl descubre una señal de vida y, en su delirio, intenta regresar vivo a la granja.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Se cuentan y se revelan secretos. Hershel se niega a reconocer la nueva realidad del mundo. Andrea sale de su coraza. Todos están más y más conscientes de que "todo es alimento para algo".

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y los demás tratan de restablecer el orden después de un descubrimiento terrible. Hershel retoma un viejo hábito y desaparece, Rick y Glenn deben seguirlo a la ciudad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Atrapados, Rick, Hershel y Glenn luchan por sobrevivir contra nuevos enemigos, tanto muertos como vivos. Shane encuentra a Lori en peligro en el camino y se impone la misión de llevarla de vuelta a la granja.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y Shane entran en conflicto por el destino de un extraño. Andrea ayuda a la hija menor de Hershel a enfrentar una decisión de importancia crucial.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick se pone del lado de Shane en una decisión importante, haciéndole pensar a Dale que el grupo está perdiendo humanidad. Las acciones de Carl tienen consecuencias no planeadas para el grupo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo se entera de que alguien peligroso puede andar suelto cerca de la granja. A medida que cae la noche, Rick, Shane, Daryl y Glenn revisan a fondo el bosque para manejar la situación y mantener al grupo a salvo.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West is attacked while guarding a precious cargo of smallpox vaccine and loses his memory from a blow on the head.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon encounter voodoo rites and a diabolical biologist and his throng of robot-like slaves.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon face a killer beast and a mystery guarded by a senator and his three sons.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A would-be dictator's attempt to assassinate President Ulysses S. Grant brings him up against secret agents West and Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A double-dealing foreign diplomat attempts to implicate the United States in an international conspiracy.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are determined to foil an ex-army general's plan to gain possession of a secret explosive formula.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A man uses a steam-driven juggernaut to drive off homesteaders so he can appropriate their oil-rich land.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon come across a physician plying a wealthy family with a drug that causes rapid aging.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon, searching for a powerful germ culture, invade the mansion of an eccentric millionaire.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A strange sea monster preying on Portuguese fishermen and their boats becomes the object of an investigation by agents West and Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon must escape a Western town whose entire population is hunting them to free the prisoner they have taken.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret Service agent James West seeks to find a missing ruby for an Egyptian Princess.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon determine to foil the recovery of a fortune that was originally destined to help the Confederate cause.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A meek secret agent, whom West and Pike first feel will be a detriment, proves to be invaluable as they deal with an opium ring.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Landscape contractor Roger Cook shows a homeowner how to properly mulch his garden beds. The guys ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Richard installs a natural gas line for a barbeque grill.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: In the workshop, general contractor Tom Silva demonstrates the proper way to use hand planes. The guys ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Roger helps a homeowner repair a cracked stone walkway.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and Scott head to Denver to install a ceiling fan on a cathedral ceiling. The guys ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Richard visits New Jersey to install a water softener.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger temporarily transplants a mature rose bush. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard shows Kevin some rookie plumbing mistakes. And, Tom and Kevin replace old outdoor lighting with new fixtures.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor heads to Del Ray Beach, Florida to restore Terrazzo floors. The guys ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Tom helps a homeowner repair a cracked floor joist.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard heads to Cheyenne, Wyoming to help a homeowner install a toilet. The guys ask "What Is It?" And, Roger and Kevin patch a lawn with grass seed.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Scott helps hang a flat panel TV on the wall and conceal wiring. Scott shows Kevin examples of many different types of electrical outlets. Roger helps control insect pests without using pesticides.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin learns how to maintain kitchen appliances. The guys ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Tom helps a homeowner install a rain gutter, downspout, and rain barrel.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: With Keta Rush injured, can Stephy Slays find a new partner to help end Exile’s reign of brutality? The Psycho Sister’s leader Razor was taken out by a vicious and fiery attack last week.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Under suspicious and unusual circumstances, The WOW World Tag Team Championship is on the line tonight. Who will walk away with the most prestigious tag team titles in women’s wrestling?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tessa Blanchard finally earns her chance to redeem her loss of the WOW World Championship when she battles The Beast in the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Women Of Wrestling kicks off with the world champion The Beast, the biggest and the baddest phenom of wrestling, as she battles against the number one contender, New Jersey's own Adriana Gambino.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On WOW - Women Of Wrestling, you never know who's going to show up! She's fresh, fly and funktastic — Foxxy Fierce makes her in-ring debut against the cold-hearted dissidentIce Cold — and that's only the tip of the iceberg!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The tag team tournament is underway in a big way as the Monsters of Darkness Siren the Voodoo Doll & Chainsaw battle it out against fan favorites The Bully Busters, Keta Rush & Stephy Slays!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW World Champion The Beast puts her title on the line against the World's Greatest Attorney Sophia Lopez's newest client, Mexican luchador sensation Tormenta!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW turns up the excitement with a six-way tag team featuring Fury, Mezmeriah & Razor – The Heavy Metal Sisters throwing down against the fearsome trio of Vivian Rivera, Keta Rush & Stephy Slays!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In a Triple Threat Main Event, WOW World Champion The Beast goes head-to-head-to-head with the Queen of Kings, Reina Del Rey and luchador extraordinaire Tormenta.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In a battle against the odds, the Tonga Twins take on all three of the Heavy Metal Sisters – will the sisters be victorious or, despite being outnumbered, will the Tonga Twins win?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Women Of Wrestling is serving up action-packed tag team action as the Fashionista Family Adrianna Gambino & Gigi Gianni face off against the fiery duo of Miami Sweet Heat, Laurie and Lindsey Carlson.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Women Of Wrestling when rap superstar BK Rhythm clashes with dancing queen Chantilly Chella! In tag team action we'll see if the light of Kandi Krush & Keta Rush can overcome the darkness of Siren The Voodoo Doll & Chainsaw!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Women Of Wrestling is ready to explode through your TV with a double dose of twin-tastic action, as the Tonga Twins lock up against the devilishly dangerous Miami Sweet Heat in the Tag Team Tournament Finals!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Siren the Voodoo Doll & Chainsaw take on The Tonga Twins and Miami's very own Sweet Heat in unbelievable Triple Threat Tag Team elimination action! BK Rhythm and Glitch the Gamer team up to take on the troubled team of Kandi Krush and Keta Rush!

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh feels compelled to repay a debt to an old friend who's in jail and may hang.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings in outlaw Carlos Domingo but he has to be released when the witness against him is killed in front of Josh.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is sent for by Sheriff Mike Strata and the desperate men of Coronado.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings in a young man wanted for robbery but loses his reward and expenses.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh arrives in a town for rest and to gamble just as the local bank has been robbed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: In Mexico, Josh is hired to protect a sensible man and his pregnant wife from his father-in-law and the villagers who are angered when he refuses the town healing woman or \\"witch\\".

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: After Josh reluctantly takes the task of finding a man and his wife's pet ewe, he becomes the butt of many jokes in the community while cattlemen nearly hang him when he mentions sheep.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a convicted killer escapes prison, Josh is hired for $500 to protect the woman whose testimony put him there.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides into a town looking for a man who asked him to come there for a job that pays $500.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is hired by Harry Weaver to track down his twin brother Pete, who's wanted with a $500 bounty on him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is called in to track down a new outlaw - the local sheriff who is a friend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly takes a job protecting a beautiful deaf, mute, teenage girl and keeping everyone off the father's place for a day or two.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh escorts an East Coast photographer to take a picture of his friend El Gato (The Cat), who is a famous, hilarious bandit living in the hills of Mexico with a small army.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A broke Josh is hired by a fearful man to help him elope with his sweetheart, Jane, the daughter of a local rancher.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh takes a job for $200 protecting an express office employee who stole $10,000 and wants to return it before it's discovered missing.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A Japanese woman travels to the U.S. to find an American man who proposed to her in Japan and hires Josh to find him since no one will help her in her search.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh arrives in town thinking the sheriff summoned him to go after a man.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides to Barney Durant's horse business to rent a couple of horses right after Barney pushes his son David to leave.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin wakes up after being drugged, beaten and robbed in the town of Blue Bell by five men, one of whom is the town's sheriff.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: The sheriff of a small town needs help to prevent the execution of simple-minded Andy Dawes. The townspeople are sure he is a murderer. Paladin offers to help.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: An ex-gunfighter, Roy Calvert, blames the people of Benedict for his wife's death. The town is in the middle of a drought and Calvert and his son are blocking the only access to water in the area.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: A British woman, Diana Coulter, hires Paladin to guide her to her brother's ranch in Shiprock, Arizona, where the Comanches are on the warpath.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Two ornery old gold miners, who hate each other, have struck it rich. Problem is they talk too much, and now it appears someone is trying to kill them.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is hired to protect Oscar Wilde. Another 3 men apply for the job, but after Paladin upstages them they kidnap Wilde for ransom. Paladin takes care of them, his way.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin goes to inform a cavalry corporal that he has won $600,000 in a lottery. But they may not live to cash in the ticket, they are trapped by several dozen hostile Indians.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: On his way to help a man and his daughter over a land dispute, Paladin encounters a wealthy, drunk and helpless man whose guide left him behind to die.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: The 'Tombstone Epitaph's' Editor Claibourne is following up on a report that a notorious outlaw is living in Tombstone as a respected citizen. Hollister thinks that this search is his jurisdiction and sets out to score a new 'beat' on his good friend.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: His gun-arm badly wounded, Clay Hollister (Pat Conway) takes a vacation in Tucson where he encounters the brother of a killer he once brought to justice. With Clay at a disadvantage, he is forced to a shooting showdown...left-handed.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister doesn't know the identity of the 'brain' directing an epidemic of outlawry in the Territory. But when handsome Horn Burnett and his brother commit murder, the attachment of a rancher's wife for the outlaw gives Clay a hint at the truth.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Clay Hollister (Pat Conway) goes undercover as prisoner Bert Taggert in order to prevent Mexican bandit chief Juan Diega from robbing the Tombstone bank in order to finance his revolutionaries. But then the real Taggert shows up.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister (Pat Conway) must collect taxes from Galeyville - a nest of outlaws headed by notorious gunman Curly Bill Brocious (Robert Foulk) - which lies in Tombstone Territory. It's a mission he views as leading to an almost certain death.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: After an outlaw escapes from a stagecoach killing, Editor Claibourne spearheads a drive in Tombstone to raise a $5,000 reward for his capture, but this may cause problems for Sheriff Hollister who must also now deal with greedy bounty hunters.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Cattleman Sam Brewster's men stop in Tombstone overnight while driving a herd through Arizona. Brewster's son starts blowing off steam, and Sheriff Hollister's deputy is forced to shoot him. Enraged, Brewster threatens to avenge his son's death.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: After killing a man in self-defense in the town of Galeno, Sheriff Hollister (Pat Conway) finds himself hauled before a kangaroo court for trial on a murder charge, the penalty of which is death. An unexpected ally comes to Hollister's defense.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Raoul de Moreney -- a slick card shark and fortune hunter -- comes to Tombstone in search of quick riches. His vicious greed nettles the editor of the Epitaph and, in a flush of anger, the two men agree to a duel…but de Moreney is a deadly duelist.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Gunslinger Jake Hoyt plots a radical means of rising to power in Tombstone -- by snatching the sheriff's job away from Clay Hollister. To succeed, Hoyt plans to outshine Hollister as a sharpshooter. The result is inevitable: a dramatic showdown.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bret is more than happy to escort a lovely young widow with a large sum of cash to the bank -- until he realizes the money is all counterfeit.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: When Bret is the only member of a jury who believes the young man on trial for murder is innocent, he uses a very long-odds poker trick to convince his fellow jurors of the truth.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bret must stop a rancher from taking over the town after the rancher murders the marshal -- so he asks the townspeople to do something.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Shakespearean actors are going to perform in San Diego during their roundup. They are in for a rough reception.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Sid Morgan hires Paladin to protect him from someone who is trying to kill him. After killing the gunfighter who was following them, Paladin finds out the real reason Morgan hired him.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: John Kellaway, who is running for mayor of Colton, Wyoming, hires Paladin to protect him from his opposition.
